sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 48:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section III, List of Answers on Terminology 48:1
items.html: The will to receive in the emanated being is regarded as its general “substance.” Its four phases are regarded as the four forms of the desire, called HB TM (see item 84). (Part 3, Chapter 6, item 3)
